prestazioni: Engine swap to a **4.6L Stroker (AMC 242-based)** built with a **Scat Enterprises 4.0L crankshaft (forged 4.090" stroke)**, **JE Pistons 2618 forged slugs (9.5:1 compression)**, and **Manley H-beam connecting rods**. Paired with a **Holley Sniper EFI (terminator X) standalone ECU** for precise fuel and ignition mapping, eliminating the stock **AMC 4.0L (PowerTech I6)** limitations.

Forced induction via a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, T4 flange)** mounted on a **Stainless Works custom header (equal-length, 1.75" primaries)** with a **Turbonetics Deltagate 40 wastegate (12 PSI base boost)**. Intercooled with a **Bell Intercoolers 2.5" core front-mount setup** and fed by a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump** with **ID1000 injectors (1000cc/min)** for E85 compatibility.

Suspension overhaul with **Rock Krawler TJ 3.5" X-Factor Stage 3 long-arm kit (14" travel, Johnny Joints)** paired with **Fox 2.0 Performance Series IFP shocks (remote reservoirs)**. Axles upgraded to **Dynatrac ProRock 60 front (35-spline, ARB Air Locker)** and **Dynatrac ProRock 80 rear (40-spline, Detroit Truetrac LSD)** with **Rubicon Express Super Flex joints** for articulation.
estetica: Body-wide **Poison Spyder Customs TJ Brute front fender flares (flat-style, 4" wider than stock)** paired with **GenRight Off-Road rear quarter panel cutouts (for 40" tire clearance)**. Painted in **PPG Vibrance Collection "Sahara Sand" with a **Line-X XS-100 bedliner texture** on the lower rocker panels for durability.

Front bumper replacement with a **AEV JK HD Front Bumper (modified for TJ fitment)** featuring a **Warn Zeon 10-S winch (synthetic rope, hawse fairlead)** and **Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED pods (50" light bar cutout)**. Rear bumper swapped for a **GenRight Off-Road Stubby Rear Bumper (tire carrier, dual recovery points)** with a **RotopaX 2x 2.5-gallon fuel/water mounts**.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Corbeau GTS II Pro seats (harness-ready, 5-point Schroth Profi II-6 belts)** and a **Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel (quick-release hub)**. Dash replaced with a **Racepak IQ3 digital dash (CAN bus, 8-channel logging)** and **Mastercraft Safety XTreme Series roll cage (bolt-in, DOM tubing)**. Full **Soundstream VFL-624B 6.2" touchscreen head unit** with **Kicker KX600.1 amp (600W RMS) driving a pair of Kicker CompRT 10" subs** in custom enclosures.
